May this letter find you well, Slayer, as your skills are needed once again.Something's happening in Tyria that has everyone talking. Something called the "Bazaar of the Four Winds." I'd like you to investigate the rumors.Speak with Captain Magnus the Bloody-Handed in Lion's Arch. He's more current on the situation than I. You'll find him set up at the Main Haven Headquarters in Fort Marriner.Swift travels,—Eir

Maybe...this is an ideal version of Maguuma. One without Mordremoth. One that Eir didn't die in. One that...I didn't die in. The old me, at least.  I'm still here though. I'm still breathing, even if I'm not the same person. But, the more that I think about it...maybe it's for the best. I was so angry back then... It feels weird so say that I'm better now. I'm not, but I'm getting there.  A light in the darkness, I have the best possible distraction: the Kryptis. I don't have time to mourn. We can only act, and well... It's not good. Dagda's struggling, Isgarren seems...off. Mabon's about ready to do something severe. Maybe we'll see each other again soon. I don't know if I'm ready.

Meteorlogicus was designed by a sylvari astrologer, Surya—a love letter to the sky. She once used the orrery to trace a thunderous cloud that lurked on the horizon. She knew then: a dragon had awoken.

Metrica Province is the domain of the asura of Rata Sum. The landscape is littered with their private laboratories and discarded experiments, and entire landscapes have been transformed under the not-so-gentle hands of these small geniuses.
